Package com.ibm.cloud.platform_services.platform_notifications.v1

Class PlatformNotifications

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.ibm.cloud.sdk.core.service.BaseService
      • com.ibm.cloud.platform_services.platform_notifications.v1.PlatformNotifications
  • public class PlatformNotifications
extends com.ibm.cloud.sdk.core.service.BaseService
    API for IBM Cloud account notifications, providing capabilities to: - View notifications - Get and update acknowledgements - Manage user communication preferences - Manage notification distribution lists . API Version: 1.0.0

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      static java.lang.String DEFAULT_SERVICE_NAME
      Default service name used when configuring the `PlatformNotifications` client.
      static java.lang.String DEFAULT_SERVICE_URL

    • Constructor Detail

      • PlatformNotifications

        public PlatformNotifications​(java.lang.String serviceName,
                             com.ibm.cloud.sdk.core.security.Authenticator authenticator)
        Constructs an instance of the `PlatformNotifications` client. The specified service name and authenticator are used to configure the client instance.
        Parameters:
        serviceName - the service name to be used when configuring the client instance
        authenticator - the Authenticator instance to be configured for this client

      • listNotifications

        public com.ibm.cloud.sdk.core.http.ServiceCall<NotificationCollection> listNotifications​(ListNotificationsOptions listNotificationsOptions)
        Get user notifications. Retrieve all notifications for the requested user.
        Parameters:
        listNotificationsOptions - the ListNotificationsOptions containing the options for the call
        Returns:
        a ServiceCall with a result of type NotificationCollection

      • listNotifications

        public com.ibm.cloud.sdk.core.http.ServiceCall<NotificationCollection> listNotifications()
        Get user notifications. Retrieve all notifications for the requested user.
        Returns:
        a ServiceCall with a result of type NotificationCollection

      • getAcknowledgement

        public com.ibm.cloud.sdk.core.http.ServiceCall<Acknowledgement> getAcknowledgement​(GetAcknowledgementOptions getAcknowledgementOptions)
        Get acknowledgement. Retrieve the ID of the last notification acknowledged by the user for a specific account.
        Parameters:
        getAcknowledgementOptions - the GetAcknowledgementOptions containing the options for the call
        Returns:
        a ServiceCall with a result of type Acknowledgement

      • getAcknowledgement

        public com.ibm.cloud.sdk.core.http.ServiceCall<Acknowledgement> getAcknowledgement()
        Get acknowledgement. Retrieve the ID of the last notification acknowledged by the user for a specific account.
        Returns:
        a ServiceCall with a result of type Acknowledgement

      • replaceNotificationAcknowledgement

        public com.ibm.cloud.sdk.core.http.ServiceCall<Acknowledgement> replaceNotificationAcknowledgement​(ReplaceNotificationAcknowledgementOptions replaceNotificationAcknowledgementOptions)
        Update acknowledgement. Update the ID of the last notification acknowledged by the user for a specific account.
        Parameters:
        replaceNotificationAcknowledgementOptions - the ReplaceNotificationAcknowledgementOptions containing the options for the call
        Returns:
        a ServiceCall with a result of type Acknowledgement

      • listDistributionListDestinations

        public com.ibm.cloud.sdk.core.http.ServiceCall<AddDestinationCollection> listDistributionListDestinations​(ListDistributionListDestinationsOptions listDistributionListDestinationsOptions)
        Get all destination entries. Retrieve all destinations in the distribution list for the specified account.
        Parameters:
        listDistributionListDestinationsOptions - the ListDistributionListDestinationsOptions containing the options for the call
        Returns:
        a ServiceCall with a result of type AddDestinationCollection

      • createDistributionListDestination

        public com.ibm.cloud.sdk.core.http.ServiceCall<AddDestination> createDistributionListDestination​(CreateDistributionListDestinationOptions createDistributionListDestinationOptions)
        Add a destination entry. Add a destination entry to the distribution list. A maximum of 10 destination entries per destination type. In terms of enterprise accounts, you can provide an Event Notifications destination that is from a different account than the distribution list account, provided these two accounts are from the same enterprise and the user has permission to manage the Event Notifications destinations on both accounts.
        Parameters:
        createDistributionListDestinationOptions - the CreateDistributionListDestinationOptions containing the options for the call
        Returns:
        a ServiceCall with a result of type AddDestination

      • getDistributionListDestination

        public com.ibm.cloud.sdk.core.http.ServiceCall<AddDestination> getDistributionListDestination​(GetDistributionListDestinationOptions getDistributionListDestinationOptions)
        Get a destination entry. Retrieve a specific destination from the distribution list of the account.
        Parameters:
        getDistributionListDestinationOptions - the GetDistributionListDestinationOptions containing the options for the call
        Returns:
        a ServiceCall with a result of type AddDestination

      • deleteDistributionListDestination

        public com.ibm.cloud.sdk.core.http.ServiceCall<java.lang.Void> deleteDistributionListDestination​(DeleteDistributionListDestinationOptions deleteDistributionListDestinationOptions)
        Delete a destination entry. Remove a destination entry.
        Parameters:
        deleteDistributionListDestinationOptions - the DeleteDistributionListDestinationOptions containing the options for the call
        Returns:
        a ServiceCall with a void result

      • testDistributionListDestination

        public com.ibm.cloud.sdk.core.http.ServiceCall<TestDestinationResponseBody> testDistributionListDestination​(TestDistributionListDestinationOptions testDistributionListDestinationOptions)
        Test a destination entry. Send a test notification to a destination in the distribution list. This allows you to verify that the destination is properly configured and can receive notifications.
        Parameters:
        testDistributionListDestinationOptions - the TestDistributionListDestinationOptions containing the options for the call
        Returns:
        a ServiceCall with a result of type TestDestinationResponseBody

      • getPreferences

        public com.ibm.cloud.sdk.core.http.ServiceCall<PreferencesObject> getPreferences​(GetPreferencesOptions getPreferencesOptions)
        Get all communication preferences. Retrieve all communication preferences of a user in an account.
        Parameters:
        getPreferencesOptions - the GetPreferencesOptions containing the options for the call
        Returns:
        a ServiceCall with a result of type PreferencesObject

      • createPreferences

        public com.ibm.cloud.sdk.core.http.ServiceCall<PreferencesObject> createPreferences​(CreatePreferencesOptions createPreferencesOptions)
        Create communication preferences. Create communication preferences for the specified account.
        Parameters:
        createPreferencesOptions - the CreatePreferencesOptions containing the options for the call
        Returns:
        a ServiceCall with a result of type PreferencesObject

      • replaceNotificationPreferences

        public com.ibm.cloud.sdk.core.http.ServiceCall<PreferencesObject> replaceNotificationPreferences​(ReplaceNotificationPreferencesOptions replaceNotificationPreferencesOptions)
        Update communication preferences. Update communication preferences for the specified account.
        Parameters:
        replaceNotificationPreferencesOptions - the ReplaceNotificationPreferencesOptions containing the options for the call
        Returns:
        a ServiceCall with a result of type PreferencesObject

      • deleteNotificationPreferences

        public com.ibm.cloud.sdk.core.http.ServiceCall<java.lang.Void> deleteNotificationPreferences​(DeleteNotificationPreferencesOptions deleteNotificationPreferencesOptions)
        Reset all preferences to their default values. Delete all communication preferences for the specified account, and reset all preferences to their default values.
        Parameters:
        deleteNotificationPreferencesOptions - the DeleteNotificationPreferencesOptions containing the options for the call
        Returns:
        a ServiceCall with a void result
